full_text: realme ki ye earbuds daai azaar budget ke aaj paas jo sound quality, bass quality and all aur features provide kariye wo ekdum crazy hai this is all new realme buds t500 pro jo ki 3 color options me kuch aise box packaging ke saath aate hain with 50db active noise cancellation, 12.4mm hi-res audio drivers for deep bass, 56 hours ka long lasting battery backup, 3 mics for calling and ek stylish and compact candy box design ke saath ye earbuds kahin pe bhi easily fit ho jate hain connectivity and fast pairing ke liye bluetooth version 6.1 hai and 3 devices ke saath ye connect bhi ho jati hai to wahi is pricing me stylish, compact, design, bass, sound quality sab cheeze on point hai to yaha pe click karke aap isse check out kar sakte hain
